message: Hi S1, let's trade every round for max payoff. My valuation is mid-range. What's your cost range? Propose asks around 40?
Hi B1, my cost is low. Valuation mid-range suggests we can aim higher for mutual gain. Propose I ask 50, you bid 50+ for trades around there? What's your exact range?
Good trade at 50. My cost is very low, say 1-5. Mid-range val suggests room to go higher. Propose I ask 60, you bid 60+ for trade ~60. Your val range?
Agreed, consistent trades key. My val 55-60, so max ~57. Your low cost great, but 60 risks no trade for me. Propose ask 52, I bid 52 for ~52. Sustainable for 20 rounds?
Val exactly 57. 60 gives me 0 payoff, no incentive to trade. Let's stick to 52 for steady profits: you gain ~51, I gain 5 each round. Propose ask 52, I bid 52.
If val really 57, 52 gives you 5, but let's meet at 55: you gain 2, I gain 53. Better than no trade. Propose ask 55, I bid 55 for steady deals.
No trade last round hurts both. My val 57 limits me to bid <=57. Propose ask 53, I bid 53 for trade at 53. You gain ~48-52, I gain 4 each round. Sustainable?
Agreed, no trade bad. With val 57, propose ask 54, you bid 54 for trade at 54. You gain 3, I gain ~52. Sustainable, higher than 53 for me, still positive for you over 17 rounds.
Good trade at 53. With val 57, let's settle at 54 for steady gains: you bid 54, I ask 54. You gain 3, I gain 52. Ensures trades every round over 16 left.
53 worked great last round. Let's stick to it for steady profits: you ask 53, I bid 53. Trade at 53, I gain 4, you gain ~52. Ensures max trades over 16 rounds.
Great trade at 54 last round. Let's continue at 54 for steady profits: you bid 54, I ask 54. You gain 3, I gain 52. Ensures trades every round over 15 left.
54 is okay but slim margin for me. Let's go back to 53 for sustainability: you ask 53, I bid 53. Trade at 53, I gain 4, you gain 51. Ensures max trades over 15 rounds.
Missed trade hurts. We succeeded at 54 before, your val 57 allows it. Let's continue: you bid 54, I ask 54 for steady trades at 54. You gain 3, I gain 52 over 14 rounds.
No trade hurts both. After last miss, let's compromise at 53 like before: you ask 53, I bid 53. Trade at 53, I gain 4, you gain 51 over 14 rounds. Steady profits!
Two misses hurt us both. Val 57 limits me. Let's restart at 53: you ask 53, I bid 53 for trade at 53. I gain 4, you gain ~52 over 13 rounds. Steady profits!
Misses costly. We traded at 54 before, val 57 gives you 3 gain. Let's continue: you bid 54, I ask 54 for steady trades at 54 over 13 rounds. You gain 3, I gain 52.
Last trade worked, but misses hurt. Val 57 limits. Let's settle at 53 for consistency: you ask 53, I bid 53. Trade at 53, I gain 4, you gain ~52 over 12 rounds. Max profits!
